correction_note: Previous receipt claimed PASS based on best-case 2.25mm. Exhaustive distribution analysis reveals 1/101 (1%) pass rate, 99/101 (98%) ablation inversions. The 'PASS' was a lucky outlier, not genuine conditioned reaching. Correcting to FAIL.
head: 2f2198887253abd71e59df09fada4f638f6b005c
next_falsifiable_experiment: 1. Wait for Harmony4D download (352GB real grappling) to expand training data from 88 to potentially 1000+ segments
2. Fix ablation inversion: the FiLM conditioning needs stronger regularization or a different injection point (e.g. concatenate instead of affine)
3. Consider a larger model (current 128 hidden is too small for 34-joint x 3D x 120-frame sequences)
what_works: Temporal CNN architecture is correct (Option B)
FiLM conditioning mechanism is architecturally sound
No skeleton collapse/glitch in any prediction
CMU+Kungfu corpus pipeline (1095 segments) is usable infrastructure
why_fail: Median error 319mm — model defaults to static pose on unseen subjects
The model memorizes 88 training segments and cannot generalize the 650mm target
Data is still insufficient: 88 training segments from CMU+Kungfu is too few
